## Summary

Brief description of what this PR does and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / code cleanup
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Security fix

## Changes Made

List the files changed and what was done.

## Testing

Describe how you tested this. Include:
- Steps to reproduce the before/after behavior
- Any edge cases you verified

## Security Checklist

- [ ] No hardcoded paths, credentials, or secrets
- [ ] No `nodeIntegration: true`, `contextIsolation: false`, or `webSecurity: false`
- [ ] All new IPC handlers validate input types and IDs
- [ ] No absolute system paths returned to renderer
- [ ] `npm run build` passes with zero errors

## Related Issues

Closes # (issue number, if applicable)
